section.div: Favorites genres: Comedy, Fantasy, Slice of Life, Adventure, Romance, Drama

div.div: Silent Witch: Chinmoku no Majo no Kakushigoto

Monica Everett, the Silent Witch, is the world’s only practitioner of Voiceless Magic, a veritable heroine who single-handedly fended off the Black Dragon of legend. However, the young prodigy is actually…super-duper shy! Yup, turns out she only learned Voiceless Magic to avoid speaking in public. Ignorant of this, the Seven Sages have placed her on a top-secret mission to guard the Second Prince. Can Monica keep it together as she contends with both social interaction and the evils targeting the young royal? (Source: Yen Press, edited)
Shin no Nakama ja Nai to Yuusha no Party wo Oidasareta node, Henkyou de Slow Life suru Koto ni shimashita
Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life

A heroic and mighty adventurer dreams of...opening a pharmacy?
Red was once a part of the Hero’s party, a group destined to save the world by fighting the Raging Demon Lord. But after being betrayed by his comrade, Red hopes to start anew by opening a small apothecary in a sleepy town on the frontier. While keeping his past life a secret is the goal, it won’t be easy...especially when a beautiful adventurer from his past asks to move in.
(Source: Funimation)

A freelance designer loves to relax from work through gardening on his balcony. One day, a somewhat unconventional, natural woman moves in next door. Through casual encounters, they start exchanging words across the balcony without ever seeing each other's faces. (Source: Kodansha, translated)

At Dahlia Academy, a prestigious boarding school attended by students of two feuding countries—the eastern Nation of Touwa, and the Principality of West—Romio Inuzuka, leader of the dorms’ Touwa first-years, wishes for a romance that can never be. For his ladylove is none other than his arch-enemy, Juliet Persia, leader of the dorms’ West first-years! Is Inuzuka ready to risk it all to confess his feelings? And even if Persia somehow agrees to go out with them, how long can they keep a forbidden relationship under wraps?! (Source: Kodansha USA) Note: Includes two extra chapters.
Goshujin-sama to Yuku Isekai Survival! THE COMIC
Action, Adventure, Comedy, Ecchi, Fantasy, Romance

Kousuke suddenly wakes up alone in a vast forest that clearly isn’t anywhere on Earth. Now he has to find some way to eat, drink, and survive! Luckily, Kousuke also has the power to craft using a special video game menu that allows him to harvest resources and build whatever he can imagine. However, every time he goes to sleep, he’s attacked by one of the many non-human races of this world, all of whom despise humankind. Enter Sylphy, the beautiful dark elf who lays claim to Kousuke and vows to protect him–after all, she’s taken him as her property!
(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
Gokugoku Futsuu no Fuufu no Hanashi

"Appears Out of Nowhere", focusing on the protagonists' life after the two got married. Unlike the previous work, it's a very ordinary story of an utterly ordinary couple.
Haru, a huge fan of his husband's sweat smell, and Aki, who loves his wife dearly, will now enjoy relaxed and intimate moments together they couldn't have before.
In addition to the full-length manga and illustrations about the protagonists' college days that has been already published on Twitter(X), this book also includes an exclusive 3-page manga that has not yet been published on socials!
(Source: MangaPlaza, edited)
